Auth.title: Enter ClearUp and run your semester from one place.
Auth.subtitle: Create an account or sign in to access your dashboard, planner, subjects, and focus tools inside a single workspace.
Auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Switch to sign in above.
Auth.switchToSignUp: Need an account? Switch to create account above.
Auth.demoBody: Authentication now protects the main modules and keeps your session active so the next visit goes straight to the dashboard.

Landing.title: Your whole semester, organized before the chaos starts.
Landing.subtitle: ClearUp centralizes assignments, subjects, reminders, focus, and progress so you know what to do first and avoid missing important deadlines.

tasks.title: Assignments under control
tasks.body: Track assignments, exams, and projects with priority, status, progress, and subtasks.

planner.title: Realistic planning
planner.body: Turn pending work into concrete work blocks for the week.

focus.title: Focus mode
focus.body: Work in sessions and keep the items that need attention visible.

analytics.title: Visible progress
analytics.body: Review load, progress, and risk signals before tasks pile up.

flow.title: Fewer disconnected screens. More useful decisions.
flow.body: The home page explains the platform value before sign-in; after login, you go straight to the private dashboard to work.

accordion.title: What ClearUp does for your semester.
accordion.body: An interactive accordion summarizes the key benefits so users quickly understand why they should enter the platform.

priority.title: How does it help me prioritize?
priority.body: It brings assignments, dates, and progress together so you can identify the most urgent activity before starting work.

focus.title: What happens when I have too many tasks?
focus.body: You can turn academic load into a clear sequence: capture, plan, and move forward with focus sessions.

progress.title: Can I see my progress?
progress.body: The dashboard and analytics show progress, risk, and weekly load signals so you can make better decisions.

final.title: Create your account or sign in and start organizing your semester from one place.

Home.title: Hi, {name}. Choose how you want to start today.
Home.subtitle: Before jumping into details, use this space as your starting point and go directly to the module you need for the day.
Home.todayTitle: Start with the big picture, then go deeper.
Home.todayBody: Review your overall load, enter your active tasks, and then move into focus mode or weekly planning depending on what is pending.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.body: Review your load, progress, priorities, and main recommendation for the day.

tasks.title: Assignments and exams
tasks.body: Manage activities, deadlines, reminders, and subtasks from a single place.

planner.title: Weekly planner
planner.body: Distribute your week, detect upcoming deadlines, and reserve useful work blocks.

subjects.title: Subjects and grades
subjects.body: Track courses, grade simulations, semester goals, and study resources.

assistantCard.title: Ask for help when you are not sure what to do next.
assistantCard.body: The assistant can help you prioritize, understand your academic load, and suggest a next step without leaving the platform.

Profile.title: Manage your profile
Profile.subtitle: Update your core account information so your workspace stays personalized and consistent across the platform.
Profile.accountBody: This information is used to identify your session and display your data across the workspace.
Profile.formBody: Change your name, email, and password from one place.

placeholders.name: Your full name
placeholders.password: Leave blank if you do not want to change it

Profile.passwordHelp: If you do not want to change your password, leave this field blank.

Subjects.title: Subject Management
Subjects.intro: Register your courses, current grades, and simulate what you need to reach your target in each class.

summary.projectedAverageDetail: Weighted average based on current grades and targets.

profilePlaceholders.name: Your name
profilePlaceholders.goal: Academic / personal goal for this semester

form.description: Add evaluations with their weight and register your current grades to project results.

empty.title: You have not added subjects yet
empty.body: Create a subject and register its evaluations to start simulating your projected average.

Common.welcome: Hi, Samuel. What are we organizing today?

Tasks.title: Unified delivery and exam management
Tasks.subtitle: Create and manage assignments, exams, and projects in one place with priority, status, subtasks, progress, and reminders so important deadlines do not slip.
Tasks.formDescription: Register a new academic obligation or update its progress without leaving this view.

labels.noAlerts: There are no critical alerts right now.
labels.noActivities: You have not added activities yet. Create an assignment, exam, or project to get started.
labels.emptyHint: Start by completing the form on the left
labels.autoProgressHelp: Progress is calculated automatically from completed subtasks.

smartMessages.criticalDeadline: The deadline is too close and this activity still needs immediate attention.
smartMessages.highPriorityStalled: This is a high-priority activity, but progress is still too low for the time left.
smartMessages.reminderMissing: This activity has no reminder configured and could easily be forgotten.
smartMessages.lowProgress: Progress is low compared with how close the deadline is; it should be addressed now.
smartMessages.onTrack: Active activities are under control and show no urgent escalation signals.
smartMessages.criticalAction: Enable an early reminder and move the activity into in-progress so it gets handled today.
smartMessages.highAction: Raise attention on this activity and reserve an immediate work block.
smartMessages.reminderAction: Set an automatic reminder before the deadline.
smartMessages.progressAction: Raise the minimum expected progress and keep the task under active follow-up.

Dashboard.title: Load and productivity dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Summarize your academic, work, and personal load so you can decide what to tackle first during the week.

details.totalActivities: Total assignments, exams, and projects currently registered.
details.dueSoon: Active items due within the next seven days.
details.averageProgress: Average progress across all registered activities.
details.critical: Items at highest urgency due to closeness or delay.

labels.emptyStateBody: Once you add activities in My Tasks, this view will show real load, progress, and priorities.
labels.noRecommendation: There are no activities to prioritize yet.

Reminders.title: Smart reminders
Reminders.subtitle: Automatic alerts based on urgency and importance. Reminders scale as the deadline approaches.
Reminders.escalationSubtitle: View critical alerts that need immediate attention
Reminders.noAlerts: No alerts at this time. Your activities are under control.

Calendar.title: Weekly planning
Calendar.subtitle: Distribute your tasks in time blocks and sync with external calendars.

Inbox.title: Ideas & Inbox
Inbox.subtitle: Quickly capture your ideas and pending tasks without classifying them. Organize later.
Inbox.placeholder: Write an idea or pending task...
Inbox.emptyBody: Create quickly without worrying about details. Ideas can be converted to tasks later.

Analytics.title: My progress
Analytics.subtitle: Review your weekly and monthly performance with pattern indicators.
Analytics.noData: Not enough data yet to show analysis

Resources.title: Study resources
Resources.subtitle: Organize links, documents, and notes by subject
Resources.addFirst: Add your first resource for this subject

AIAssistant.title: Academic Assistant
AIAssistant.subtitle: Intelligent analysis of your academic workload
AIAssistant.greeting: Hi, I'm your Academic Assistant. Tell me how I can help you.
